final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of an industrial-style café interior with raw concrete walls, exposed metal pipes, vintage leather sofas, and large windows flooding the space with natural light.

Style/medium: photorealistic interior editorial photography, inspired by moody architectural magazines like Wallpaper* and Kinfolk
Composition: wide-angle shot from mid-room level, 24mm lens, capturing depth from foreground seating to background windows
Subject: industrial café interior — bare concrete walls, exposed overhead metal pipes, worn vintage leather sofas, oversized industrial windows, black-and-white photography prints hung on the wall
Scene/backdrop: daytime café interior, city street faintly visible through large windows, no customers, quiet and atmospheric
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light streaming through large windows, gentle shadows on concrete surfaces, warm pockets of ambient light near seating — rugged yet refined
Color palette: cool grey concrete as dominant base, warm cognac leather as anchor, matte black metal as structural accent, neutral white daylight as fill
Materials/textures: rough porous concrete surface, brushed and aged metal pipe joints, cracked patina leather upholstery, matte glass window panes
Avoid: overly polished surfaces, plastic-looking materials, generic coffee shop clichés, neon signs, over-warm Instagram filter tones, watermark
